title: zehneria umbellata
intro: Zehneria umbellata, also known as the Indian pennywort, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, Zehneria umbellata is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cognitive function, and act as a natural diuretic. Zehneria umbellata can be prepared as an herbal tea, powder, or extract, and is also used in traditional Indian cooking as a culinary herb.
